productName: Tasty Terps - TT BHO 1g - Cranberry Pomegranate - 1g
description: A workhorse hybrid dab: Cranberry Pomegranate run through a closed-loop butane extraction and finished to a smooth, high-potency concentrate. Potent, clean, and lab-tested — a sweet, ripe berry flavor, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
